items.title: JPMorganChase Files Form 10-Q for the Quarter Ended June 30, 2025
items.description: NEW YORK, August 05, 2025--JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) ("JPMorganChase" or the "Firm") has filed its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the quarter ended June 30, 2025 with the SEC. The report is available on the SEC's website at https://www.sec.gov and will be available on the Firm's Investor Relations website at https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir under SEC Filings & Other Disclosures.

items.title: Why your credit-card company might jack up your card’s APR even when the Fed holds rates steady
items.description: The average annual percentage rate on new credit-card offers has increased for four consecutive months, one expert noted.

items.title: JPM downgrades International Paper, says investor hopes for 2027 look too high
items.description: Investing.com -- JP Morgan downgraded International Paper to Neutral from Overweight, warning that earnings expectations for both 2025 and 2027 appear too optimistic following a weaker-than-expected second quarter.

items.title: Trump Says JPMorgan, Bank of America Refused His Business
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump accused two of the nation’s largest banks of rejecting his business, as his administration was preparing an executive order threatening financial institutions who refused to work with certain customers on ideological grounds.Most Read from BloombergPATH Train Service Resumes After Fire at Jersey City StationMayor Asked to Explain $1.4 Billion of Wasted Johannesburg FundsChicago Curbs Hiring, Travel to Tackle $1 Billion Budget HoleAll Hail the Humble Speed Hu

items.title: JPMorgan and Bank of America stocks drop as Trump warns of payback for ‘bad’ treatment
items.description: JPMorgan and Bank of America stocks drop as Trump warns of payback for ‘bad’ treatment
